decisions.decision: Use vi.spyOn(Storage.prototype, 'getItem'/'setItem') to mock localStorage rather than vi.stubGlobal
alternatives_rejected: vi.stubGlobal to replace localStorage entirely — more invasive and unnecessary since jsdom provides a working Storage

decisions.decision: Render SessionProvider directly instead of using renderWithProviders helper
alternatives_rejected: renderWithProviders — adds unnecessary QueryClientProvider and MemoryRouter layers when testing the provider itself

decisions.decision: Suppress console.error for the useSession-outside-provider test using the same pattern as ErrorBoundary.test.tsx
alternatives_rejected: Let errors print — would produce noisy test output that confuses developers

decisions.decision: Explicitly test isConfigured edge cases: accountId-only logic, including that agentId alone does NOT make isConfigured true
alternatives_rejected: Only test happy path — would miss documenting the accountId-only behavior

decisions.decision: Test both invalid JSON and valid JSON with missing/partial fields for corrupt storage scenarios
alternatives_rejected: Only test invalid JSON — would miss documenting the nullish coalescing fallback behavior for partial data

decisions.decision: Use renderHook from @testing-library/react for testing useSession hook directly
alternatives_rejected: Create wrapper test components to call the hook — renderHook is cleaner and available in @testing-library/react v16

steps.task: Create frontend/src/__tests__/session.test.tsx with test scaffold: imports, describe blocks, beforeEach (localStorage.clear + vi.restoreAllMocks), and console.error suppression for error-throwing tests

Write loadSession tests: (a) returns defaults when localStorage is empty, (b) loads valid stored session, (c) returns defaults for invalid JSON (corrupt storage), (d) returns defaults for valid JSON with missing fields, (e) returns partial data for valid JSON with only some fields present
Write saveSession tests via SessionProvider: (a) setAccountId persists to localStorage, (b) setAgentId persists to localStorage, (c) verify JSON structure written to storage
Write isConfigured tests: (a) false when both empty, (b) true when accountId set + agentId empty, (c) false when accountId empty + agentId set, (d) true when both set
Write useSession-outside-provider test: verify it throws 'useSession must be used within SessionProvider' error, with console.error suppression
Run vitest to confirm all tests pass, fix any issues
